pathology_text: Lung adenocarcinoma, acinar-predominant, 3.2 cm, left lower lobe. 2 of 15 mediastinal lymph nodes positive. No distant metastases on PET-CT.
EGFR exon 19 deletion-positive lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV (T2 N3 M1b), liver metastases × 2. PD-L1 TPS 30%. ALK/ROS1 negative.
ALK-rearranged lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV (T3 N2 M1a), malignant pleural effusion. No brain metastases. Treatment-naive.
Lung adenocarcinoma, PD-L1 TPS 80%, no EGFR/ALK/ROS1 mutations. Stage IV (T2 N3 M1b). KRAS G12C wild-type. No prior therapy.
KRAS G12C-mutant lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV. Post-platinum + pembrolizumab (2 prior lines). ECOG PS 1.
MET exon 14 skipping-positive lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV (T4 N2 M1b). No prior MET inhibitor. ECOG PS 1.
ROS1 fusion-positive lung adenocarcinoma (ROS1-CD74), Stage IV with 2 brain metastases. Treatment-naive.
BRAF V600E-mutant lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV (T2 N1 M1b). PD-L1 TPS 5%. No prior BRAF-targeted therapy.
HER2-amplified lung adenocarcinoma (IHC 3+), Stage IV. Post-platinum + pemetrexed (1 prior line). ECOG PS 1.
NTRK3 fusion-positive lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV. Treatment-naive. Age 38.
Lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IB (T2a N0 M0), peripheral, acinar pattern. EGFR exon 19 deletion. Complete resection.
Lung adenocarcinoma, micropapillary predominant, Stage IIIB (T4 N2 M0), unresectable. PD-L1 TPS 40%.
Lung adenocarcinoma, EGFR T790M on rebiopsy after gefitinib failure, Stage IV.
Lung adenocarcinoma EGFR exon 20 insertion (S768_D770dup), Stage IV. Treatment-naive.
Lung adenocarcinoma, STK11+KRAS G12C co-mutation, Stage IV. PD-L1 TPS 5%. Treatment-naive.
Lung adenocarcinoma, high TMB (22 mut/Mb), PD-L1 TPS 15%. No EGFR/ALK/ROS1/KRAS. Stage IV.
Stage IA1 lung adenocarcinoma, lepidic-predominant, 0.9 cm, pT1a N0. Resected R0.
Lung adenocarcinoma with liver + bone metastases, EGFR L858R. Stage IVB (M1c). PD-L1 TPS 20%.
Lung adenocarcinoma EGFR wild-type, ALK/ROS1 negative, PD-L1 TPS 1-49%. Stage IV. Treatment-naive. ECOG PS 2.
Lung adenocarcinoma, RET fusion (RET-KIF5B), Stage IV. Treatment-naive.
Lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IIA (T2b N0 M0). Lobectomy. EGFR L858R. No adjuvant chemotherapy yet.
Lung adenocarcinoma with malignant pericardial effusion, Stage IVA. EGFR negative. PD-L1 TPS 55%.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IV, EGFR exon 19 deletion, 3 brain metastases. Post-osimertinib (18 months). MET amplification on rebiopsy.
Lung adenocarcinoma POLE exon 9 mutation, ultra-high TMB (>100 mut/Mb), MSS. Stage IV.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IIIA (T2 N2 M0). EGFR L858R. Concurrent CRT completed. PD-L1 TPS 30%.
NRG1 fusion-positive lung adenocarcinoma (NRG1-CD74). Stage IV. Treatment-naive.
Lung adenocarcinoma, KEAP1+NFE2L2 co-mutation, no driver. Stage IV. ECOG PS 1.
Lung adenocarcinoma, ALK rearrangement, Stage IV, post-alectinib 14 months. Crizotinib-naive. G1202R resistance mutation.
Lung adenocarcinoma, FGFR1 amplification, Stage IV. Post-platinum/IO failure.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage II (T2b N1 M0). Resected. EGFR wild-type. PD-L1 TPS 60%. Post-resection adjuvant chemo completed.
Lung adenocarcinoma in situ (AIS), 0.6 cm, pure lepidic, no invasion.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IIIB, T4 N2 M0. Invading carina. EGFR L858R. Unresectable.
Lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV, second-line (post-platinum/pemetrexed). PD-L1 TPS 0%. EGFR wild-type. ECOG PS 2.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IV. EGFR exon 19 deletion. Brain metastases × 5. Treatment-naive.
Lung adenocarcinoma with atrial invasion (T4), N3 disease, M0. Stage IIIC. Unresectable.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IV. Osimertinib progression. EGFR C797S + T790M co-mutation on liquid biopsy.
Lung adenocarcinoma, pT2a N1 M0 (Stage IIA). R0 resection. ALK rearrangement confirmed.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IV, PD-L1 TPS 0%, EGFR/ALK/ROS1 negative, KRAS WT. Treatment-naive.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IV. FGFR2 fusion. Post-platinum chemotherapy. ECOG PS 1.
Lung adenocarcinoma with KRASG12D, MSS, no IO benefit. Stage IV. Post 2 platinum lines.
Lung squamous cell carcinoma, Stage IV (T3 N3 M1b). PD-L1 TPS 60%. Treatment-naive.
Lung squamous carcinoma, Stage III A (T2b N2 M0). Unresectable. PD-L1 TPS 20%. Post-concurrent CRT.
Squamous cell lung carcinoma Stage IV. Post-platinum failure. PD-L1 TPS 10%. ECOG PS 1.
Squamous lung carcinoma, Stage IIB post-resection. Adjuvant cisplatin + vinorelbine completed.
Squamous lung carcinoma, Stage IV. PD-L1 TPS 0%. High TMB (20 mut/Mb). Treatment-naive.
Lung squamous carcinoma, Stage 0 (carcinoma in situ), superficial bronchial.
Lung squamous carcinoma Stage IV. ECOG PS 3. PD-L1 TPS 55%. Multiple comorbidities.
Squamous lung carcinoma, DDR2 L239R mutation confirmed. Stage IV. Post-platinum.
Squamous lung carcinoma, FGFR1 amplification. Stage IV. Post-platinum+IO.
Lung squamous carcinoma, PIK3CA E545K. Stage IV third-line.
Squamous lung carcinoma Stage IVA. Pericardial invasion. PD-L1 1-49%. Treatment-naive.
Squamous lung carcinoma Stage IIIB. Recurrent after surgery + adjuvant chemo. PD-L1 TPS 5%.
Squamous lung carcinoma Stage IB. Complete resection. Lymph nodes negative. PD-L1 TPS 0%.
Squamous cell lung carcinoma. Stage IV, haemoptysis. Active. PD-L1 TPS 80%. No prior IO.
Squamous lung carcinoma Stage IV. Third-line after platinum + docetaxel + nivolumab.
Colon adenocarcinoma, pT3 N2a M0 (Stage IIIB). KRAS wild-type. BRAF wild-type. MSS. Left-sided primary.
MSI-H colon adenocarcinoma, pT3 N1a M1a (liver only). Lynch syndrome suspected.
BRAF V600E-mutant colon adenocarcinoma, pT4a N2b M1b. MSS. Liver + lung metastases.
Colon adenocarcinoma, HER2-amplified (IHC 3+). KRAS/NRAS/BRAF wild-type. MSS. Stage IV, second-line.
Colon adenocarcinoma, MSI-H, BRAF V600E co-mutation. Stage IV. Treatment-naive. Pembrolizumab candidate.
Colon adenocarcinoma, pT2 N0 M0 (Stage I). Complete resection. MMR proficient.
Colon adenocarcinoma, NTRK2 fusion. Stage IV. Post-FOLFOX 6 cycles.
Colon adenocarcinoma KRAS G12C mutant. Stage IV. First metastatic line.
Colon adenocarcinoma, pT3 N0 M0 (Stage II). MSS. Low risk. No high-risk features.
Lynch syndrome colon adenocarcinoma (MLH1 germline). pT4b N0 M0 (Stage IIB). MSI-H.
Colon adenocarcinoma, POLE exon 9 mutation, ultra-high TMB. MSS. Stage IV.
Colon adenocarcinoma right-sided primary. KRAS/NRAS/BRAF wild-type. MSS. Stage IV. Treatment-naive.
Colon adenocarcinoma Stage IV, BRAF V600E, MSS. Second-line (post-FOLFOX).
Colon adenocarcinoma pT4b N2b M0 (Stage IIIC). High risk. Mucinous subtype. KRAS G12D.
Rectal adenocarcinoma, cT3 N1 M0 (Stage IIIB). MSS. KRAS G13D. Pre-treatment.
Colon adenocarcinoma, Stage IV (liver + peritoneum). KRAS G12V. DPYD *2A heterozygous.
Colon adenocarcinoma Stage IV. MSI-H. Treatment-naive. Fit patient. Pembrolizumab vs FOLFOX decision.
Colon adenocarcinoma, Stage IV. KRAS/NRAS/BRAF WT. MSS. Left-sided. Second-line post-FOLFOX+bevacizumab.
Colon adenocarcinoma, RAS/BRAF wild-type. MSS. Lung-only oligo-metastatic (2 lesions). Resectable intent.
Colon adenocarcinoma, Stage IV. 5th line. Post-FOLFOX, FOLFIRI, bevacizumab, regorafenib, TAS-102.
Colon adenocarcinoma pT3 N0 M0 (Stage IIA). High-risk: T4 invasion absent. KRAS mutant. MSS.
Colon adenocarcinoma pT2 N1b M0 (Stage IIIA). KRAS WT. MSS. Left-sided. Post-resection.
Colon adenocarcinoma. MSI-H dMMR Lynch syndrome (MSH2 germline). Stage IV liver-only. Pembrolizumab initiated.
Rectal adenocarcinoma, pCR after total neoadjuvant therapy. ypT0 N0. MSS.
Colon adenocarcinoma, HER2 IHC 3+. KRAS/NRAS/BRAF WT. MSS. Stage IV. Post-FOLFIRI+bevacizumab.
Colon adenocarcinoma, Stage IV. KRAS G12C. Post-first-line FOLFOX.
Colon adenocarcinoma. pT3 N2a M0 (Stage IIIB). DPYD*2A wild-type. MSS. Left. CAPOX adjuvant initiated.
Colon adenocarcinoma. Stage IV. MSS KRAS WT BRAF WT. Third-line post-FOLFOX, FOLFIRI+cetuximab.
Colon adenocarcinoma. Stage IV. RAS/BRAF WT. MSS. ctDNA positive post-resection. Adjuvant decision.
Rectal adenocarcinoma. cT4b N2 M0 (Stage IIIC). MSI-H. Neoadjuvant IO before surgery?
Hyperplastic polyp of the colon, 3 mm, no dysplasia, no atypia.
Tubular adenoma, low-grade dysplasia, 8 mm, completely excised.
Lung biopsy: organising pneumonia. No malignancy identified. Inflammatory infiltrate.
Hamartoma of the lung, 1.4 cm, chondromyxoid stroma, fat tissue, bronchial elements. Completely resected.
Tubulovillous adenoma with focal high-grade dysplasia. No submucosal invasion. Excised.

biomarkers: MMR IHC if Lynch syndrome suspicion

pathology_text: Atypical adenomatous hyperplasia (AAH) of the lung, 3 mm GGO. No invasion.
Carcinoid tumorlet of the lung, 0.2 cm, Ki-67 <2%, no angioinvasion.
Sessile serrated adenoma of the colon, 5 mm, no dysplasia.
Benign reactive lymphoid hyperplasia, mediastinal biopsy. No malignant cells.
Fibrous pleural plaque. No asbestos bodies. No malignancy.
Lung adenocarcinoma, Stage IV, EGFR L858R, T790M detected after osimertinib failure. Rebiopsy: SCLC transformation confirmed.
Colon adenocarcinoma, pT1 N0 M0 (Stage I), polyp-based, completely excised with clear margins.
Lung squamous carcinoma, Stage IV, second-line, docetaxel + ramucirumab after pembrolizumab.
Colon adenocarcinoma Stage IV. MSI-H. Post-pembrolizumab progression (rare). Second IO attempted.
Lung adenocarcinoma Stage IV. EGFR exon 19 deletion. ECOG PS 0. Liver-only. Oligo-metastatic. Treatment-naive.
